results.title: Cooler Master Showcases Hybrid CPU Cooler and Innovative Master Flow GPU Exhaust Fans at Computex
results.description: At Computex 2026, we’ve covered a number of well-designed and unique CPU coolers, from the new Cryorig semi-passive cooling case to AIO coolers with swiveling displays on them, and Cooler Master is expanding the list of innovative products at the show with its new hybrid AIO CPU cooler, a new GPU exhaust system, and new...

results.title: Gemini’s biggest problem in Android Auto isn’t a bug—it’s what it refuses to do
results.description: Gemini’s debut on Android Auto has been a bit bumpy, to say the least. There are plenty of legitimate issues that Google needs to iron out still, but I’ve made an effort to give it a fair try. However, my main complaint isn’t a bug—it’s a feature that’s completely missing. Read More

results.title: Brave is charging $60 to remove features it added in the first place
Brave is charging $60 to remove features it added in the first place - XDA

results.title: The Benchy world record is something every 3D printer owner needs to see
results.description: The Benchy has become the unofficial mascot of the 3D printing world. What started as a model of a toy boat designed to benchmark print quality and speed has evolved into a rite of passage for new printer owners. Read More

results.title: AI to Pre-Screen Land Development Permits, Cutting Processing Time 30%
results.description: South Korea's MOLIT will roll out an AI service to pre-screen land development permits nationwide in late 2026, cutting processing times by over 30% and saving 7.5 billion won annually.
